# Brand Allowlist — Historical File Regex Patterns
# Files listed here are ALLOWED to contain "Claude Ulak" references because they
# document historical / version-lineage / release-migration state. New docs must
# use "Ulak OS" terminology; "Claude Ulak" residue outside these files is a CI failure.
#
# Format: one regex pattern per line; comments start with #.
# Patterns are OR-joined at CI time by scripts/check-brand-consistency.sh
#
# Authoritative as of Ulak OS v2.1.4.

docs/history/version-lineage\.md
VERSION_DISTRIBUTION_MATRIX\.md
RELEASE_NOTES_1\.0\.0\.md
ROADMAP\.md
docs/ecosystem/related-work\.md
docs/ecosystem/related-work\.en\.md
README\.md
README\.en\.md
releases/1\.9\.1/
CHANGELOG\.md
VERSIONING\.md
docs/superpowers/(plans|specs)/(archive/)?
